creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
I added a new patch that reorders some misplaced variables.

Unfortunately, the port fails to fetch:

===>   cassandra3-3.11.7 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> apache-cassandra-3.11.7-src.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /data/fernape_data/FreeBSD-repos/ports/head/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://www.apache.org/dist/cassandra/3.11.7/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-src.tar.gz
apache-cassandra-3.11.7-src.tar.gz                      34 MB 9072 kBps    04s
=> apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /data/fernape_data/FreeBSD-repos/ports/head/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/yuri/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/yuri/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.us-east.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/yuri/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.us-east.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/yuri/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.eu.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/yuri/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.eu.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/yuri/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.us-west.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/yuri/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.us-west.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/yuri/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/apache-cassandra-3.11.7-repo.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /data/fernape_data/FreeBSD-repos/ports/head/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Would you mind having a look?
